backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing an e-commerce system with product management, order processing, user profiles, and role-based access control (admin/user permissions) using mixins for storage and authorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting deployment to Internet Computer mainnet with references to frontend files, components, and test IDs for production accessibility verification.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend TypeScript/React components, pages, hooks, and configuration files describing their functionality and purpose in the e-commerce application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining a warm earth-tone color system (terracotta, sage, cream) using OKLCH color space with comprehensive design tokens for both light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with production metadata including app description, theme color, and script tag loading the React application from main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for product catalog, admin pages, orders, and order success, wrapped with theme provider, layout, profile modal, and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/AddProductForm.t: Admin form component for adding products with image upload, progress tracking, validation, and integration with backend mutation hooks using ExternalBlob for file handling.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Authorization guard component that checks admin permissions and displays appropriate loading, authentication required, or access denied messages with navigation fallback.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with sticky header navigation showing store branding, conditional menu items based on authentication/admin status, responsive mobile menu, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that toggles between login and logout states using Internet Identity, displaying appropriate icons and loading states while handling authentication errors.
frontend/src/components/OrderForm.tsx: A shopping cart dialog component that manages order items, allows quantity adjustments, calculates totals, and submits orders to the backend with authentication checks.
frontend/src/components/OrderStatusBadge: A badge component that displays order status (pending, processing, shipped, delivered) with color-coded styling.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: A card component that displays product information (image, name, description, price) with an optional 'Add to Order' button.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts authenticated users without a profile to enter their name, blocking interaction until profile setup is complete.
frontend/src/components/UpdateOrderStatu: A form component with a dropdown and submit button that allows updating an order's status through the backend API.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance, handling authentication state changes and initializing access control with an admin token.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: A context provider and hook for managing Internet Identity authentication, including login/logout functionality, identity persistence, and authentication status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: A collection of React Query hooks for fetching and mutating data including user profiles, products, orders, and admin operations through the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom design tokens defining a warm earth-tone color scheme (terracotta primary, sage green secondary, cream backgrounds) for both light and dark modes, plus utility classes for brand colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context.
frontend/src/pages/AdminOrdersPage.tsx: Admin-only page displaying all orders with customer details, product lists, totals, and status update controls; includes loading states and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/AdminProductsPage.tsx: Admin-only page for managing products with an add product form and grid display of all existing products; includes loading and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/MyOrdersPage.tsx: Customer-facing page showing authenticated user's order history with status badges, product details, and totals; redirects unauthenticated users to login.
frontend/src/pages/OrderSuccessPage.tsx: Order confirmation page displaying success message with navigation buttons to view orders or continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/ProductCatalogPage.ts: Main product browsing page with hero banner, product grid display, and floating order form for authenticated users; handles add-to-cart via custom events.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and persisting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom design system with OKLCH color variables for theming (including custom terracotta, sage, and cream brand colors), container settings, border radius variables, custom shadows, Inter font family, and accordion animations. Includes typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document at version 7 describing a business e-commerce website with 9 completed features including Internet Identity authentication, admin product/order management, public product catalog, order placement system, and warm earth-tone design theme branded as 'A Store'.
